#  Intel® Arc™ G-Series 
Handheld, not held back
[Read product brief](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/content-details/919247/content-details.html)
![Intel Arc processor badge with a purple glow on a black background](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/arc-badge-glow:1080-1080?ts=1779969608756&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
##  Intel® Arc™ G-Series 
[ Experience ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/arc/g-series/handheld-gaming.html#experience)
[ Product Specs ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/arc/g-series/handheld-gaming.html#specifications)
[ FAQ ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/details/processors/arc/g-series/handheld-gaming.html#faq)
[ Read product brief ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/content-details/919247/content-details.html)
* * *
![A handheld gaming device with Battlefield 6 on the screen](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/hh-render-device-parachute-man-1-1-:1920-1080?ts=1779969607756&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
##  No tradeoffs. Just play. 
High-performance play that keeps going — and stays ready. Intel® Arc™ G-Series processors power the next level of handheld gaming, delivering smooth, responsive play with performance that lasts wherever you play.
Performance
##  Play at high settings by default 
Intel® Arc™ G-Series processors deliver huge performance plus AI‑powered upscaling and multi-frame generation for smooth, ​responsive gameplay and lasting performance wherever you play.
![Battlefield Tank Screenshot](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/battlefield-tank-scene-logo-v2?qlt=80&wid=375&ts=1779919238070&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
Endurance
##  Built for extended play 
More playing, less charging. Designed for efficient performance, Intel® Arc™ G-Series processors help you get more gaming from every charge.
![A woman on an airplane plays a game on her handheld device](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/girl-playing-handheld-airplane?qlt=80&wid=375&ts=1779969605649&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
Experience
##  Fast from start to resume 
Fast startup, quick resume, and optimized drivers help Intel® Arc™ G-Series processors keep games running smoothly from day zero.
![Handheld Device with Naraka](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/nakara-scene-handheld:1080-1080?ts=1779919233086&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
##  Play the games you love 
Get an Xbox console‑inspired, controller‑optimized, dedicated gaming experience on your Windows 11 handheld—and bring all your games from most PC storefronts.1
![Blue Background with Gaming Titles with Glow](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/game-titles-background-eng-v3?qlt=80&wid=1024&ts=1779976606313&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
##  Level-up your handheld experience 
Connectivity
##  Instant connectivity 
Thunderbolt™ 4 delivers up to 40Gbps data and video speeds, with Intel® Wi‑Fi 7 and dual Intel® Bluetooth® Core 6.0 for low‑latency connectivity.
Precompiled Shaders
##  Built to play, not wait 
Precompiled Shader Distribution cuts time spent compiling shaders in select games—less time on loading screens, less in‑game stutter, more time playing.
Ray Tracing
##  Turn up the eye candy 
Designed to run in handheld power profiles, the latest gen Xᵉ3 graphics brings richer lighting, reflections, and shadows, including ray tracing support.
Retro Scaling
##  Make old games look new 
Intel® Retro Scaling brings low-res, pixel-art games or older content to modern high-resolution displays without blur, using integer scaling technology to keep pixels sharp and crisp.
##  Intel® Arc™ G-Series processors 
##  Intel® Arc™ G3 Extreme processor 
[See product specs](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/sku/245625/intel-arc-g3-extreme-processor-12m-cache-up-to-4-70-ghz/specifications.html)
![Intel Arc G3 Extreme Badge](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-arc-badge-extreme-new?qlt=80&wid=375&ts=1779969610048&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
##  Intel® Arc™ G3 processor 
[See product specs](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/products/sku/245626/intel-arc-g3-processor-12m-cache-up-to-4-60-ghz/specifications.html)
![Intel Arc G3 Badge](https://intelcorp.scene7.com/is/image/intelcorp/intel-arc-badge-new?qlt=80&wid=375&ts=1779969612934&&fmt=png8-alpha&dpr=on,1)
##  Resources 
[ Read the product brief ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/content-details/919247/content-details.html)
[ Intel gaming overview ](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/gaming/serious-gaming.html)
[ Intel gaming access community ](https://game.intel.com/us/)
View All
View Less
##  Frequently asked questions 
###  What is the Intel® Arc™ G‑Series processor for gaming handhelds?
Intel® Arc™ G‑Series processors are purpose‑built for gaming handhelds, delivering smooth, responsive gameplay with efficient performance for longer gaming sessions, enhanced by AI‑powered Intel® XeSS 3 for higher frame rates. 
###  What is the difference between Intel® Arc™ G‑Series processors and Intel® Core™ Ultra processors?
Intel® Arc™ G‑Series processors are purpose‑built for gaming handhelds, with hardware, graphics, and power optimizations tailored specifically for portable gaming experiences. Intel® Core™ Ultra processors are designed for laptops and PCs, balancing performance across productivity, creation, and gaming. 
###  Can Intel Arc G‑Series handhelds run AAA games on high settings?
Yes. Intel® Arc™ G‑Series processors are designed to run many modern AAA games at high settings by default, delivering smooth, responsive gameplay without requiring constant manual tuning or tradeoffs. 
###  What is Intel XeSS 3 and how does it improve handheld gaming?
Intel® XeSS 3 is an AI‑based technology that improves handheld gaming by boosting frame rates while maintaining image quality. It combines AI‑powered upscaling and multi‑frame generation to deliver smoother, more responsive gameplay, especially in demanding games running on handheld devices. 
###  What is Endurance Gaming mode on Intel gaming handhelds?
Endurance Gaming mode is a built‑in feature on Intel® Arc™ G‑Series processors for gaming handhelds that intelligently balances frame rates and power consumption to help extend gaming sessions on battery. It helps maintain smooth gameplay for longer periods without requiring users to manually adjust performance or graphics settings. 
###  Does the Intel Arc G‑Series handheld support Thunderbolt 4 docking?
Yes. Intel® Arc™ G‑Series processors support Thunderbolt™ 4 docking, allowing users to connect to TVs, displays, and peripherals, and transfer large game libraries quickly—effectively turning a handheld device into a desktop‑style setup. 
###  Do Intel Arc G‑Series handhelds support ray tracing?
Yes. Intel® Arc™ G‑Series handhelds support ray tracing through the latest‑generation Intel® Xe3 graphics, delivering enhanced lighting, reflections, and shadows, including ray tracing support designed to run efficiently within handheld power profiles. 
###  Does Intel Arc G‑Series have precompiled shader distribution?
Yes. Intel® Arc™ G‑Series processors support Precompiled Shaders, which helps reduce shader compilation delays in select games, leading to faster load times and reduced in-game stutter during gameplay.

    Yes. Intel® Arc™ G‑Series processors support Precompiled Shaders, which helps reduce shader compilation delays in select games, leading to faster load times and reduced in-game stutter during gameplay.
